host_invariant: the host project does not import from .scaffold/

zero_context_entry_protocol.step_1: Read ONBOARDING.md at the sidecar root.
zero_context_entry_protocol.step_4: Call read_projection(name='agent_bootstrap') for the live PAST/PRESENT/FUTURE summary.
zero_context_entry_protocol.step_5: Begin meaningful work under Observe or Propose authority.

tiers.builder_tools: src/tools/ — see config/tool_manifest.json for per-tool details

vendable_documents.name: ONBOARDING.md
vendable_documents.purpose: explicit reading order for a cold agent or human

vendable_documents.name: IMPLEMENTATION_ROADMAP.md
vendable_documents.purpose: tranche-by-tranche build plan and current status

vendable_documents.name: SOURCE_PROVENANCE.md
vendable_documents.purpose: what was original code vs structurally borrowed

memory_model.ltm: Everything persistent on disk: journal, logs, projections, project code, sidecar code, contract.
memory_model.stm: Sliding window in agent context (managed by the agent's runtime, not the sidecar).
memory_model.bag_of_evidence: Bridge layer between STM overflow and LTM. Reserved schema; deferred implementation (DP1).
memory_model.temporal_directions: agent_bootstrap projection carries PAST + PRESENT + FUTURE — see ARCHITECTURE.md §3.6.

spine_rule: Interface -> Envelope -> Router -> ContractCheck -> Orchestrator -> Manager -> Event -> derived views. No sideways calls. The envelope is the only currency.
park_phase_discipline: Every tranche closes per contract §D / ARCHITECTURE.md §12.2. Five artifacts required: (a) tranche journal entry, (b) park-notes blob, (c) continuity docs updated, (d) accept_task + complete_task events, (e) close_journal_entry. smoke_test.py enforces drift detection.
